figures.caption: Fig. 2. Structural Similarity Index (SSIM) heatmap comparison of lung segmentation. From left: input CXR, ground truth, baseline SAM SSIM map, proposed AdaLoRA+ Full QAT SSIM map, and ∆SSIM (QAT – Baseline). Bright regions indicate higher structural agreement. Green in the difference map denotes localized improvements, while red marks degradations.
